gates.description: Distributed locks, idempotency, multi-instance correctness verified

tests.name: All 15 background jobs are lock-wrapped via withJobLock(config.name)
tests.validated: Every background job config uses withJobLock with config.name in the job loop
tests.expected: 15 jobs found, all wrapped with withJobLock({ jobName: config.name })
tests.evidence: Jobs: Economic Data Updates, Sensor Readings Generation, Commodity Price Updates, ML Predictions Regeneration, Supply Chain Risk Updates, Workforce Metrics Updates, Production KPI Updates, Historical Backtesting (Research), Automated Forecast Retraining, Forecast Accuracy Tracking, RFQ Auto-Generation, Benchmark Data Aggregation, Automation Maintenance, Automation Queue Worker, Data Retention

tests.name: First lock acquisition succeeds
tests.validated: acquireJobLock returns acquired=true for uncontested lock

tests.name: Second lock acquisition rejected (contention)
tests.validated: acquireJobLock returns acquired=false when lock already held

tests.name: Lock re-acquired after release
tests.validated: Released lock can be re-acquired

tests.name: Stale lock recovered after TTL expiry
tests.validated: Expired lock is taken over by CAS UPDATE

tests.name: withJobLock skips execution when lock already held
tests.validated: withJobLock does not execute callback if lock is contested

tests.name: withJobLock executes when lock available
tests.validated: withJobLock executes callback when lock is available

tests.name: Trigger event IDs are deterministic (same inputs, different key order → same ID)
tests.validated: buildTriggerEventId sorts keys before hashing

tests.name: Different time bucket → different ID
tests.validated: Time bucket affects trigger event ID

tests.name: Same rule, different companies → different trigger IDs
tests.validated: companyId is part of trigger event ID hash

tests.name: First createActionIdempotent creates action
tests.validated: First call creates the action

tests.name: Second createActionIdempotent is deduplicated
tests.validated: Duplicate trigger event ID is rejected

gates.description: Stripe webhook dedup, race safety, state transitions, no phantom states

tests.name: Stripe webhook dedup uses insert-first DB locking
tests.validated: acquireEventLock inserts into stripeProcessedEvents, handles 23505 (unique violation)

tests.name: Duplicate webhook delivery blocked by unique constraint
tests.validated: Second INSERT for same event_id throws unique violation

tests.name: Concurrent webhook deliveries: exactly 1 wins
tests.validated: Out of 10 concurrent INSERTs for same event_id, exactly 1 succeeds

tests.name: Subscription state transitions use monotonic guard map (structural proof)
tests.validated: ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS map with executeGuardedTransition prevents illegal state regressions

tests.name: Webhook stale lock recovery with CAS takeover (structural proof)
tests.validated: Stale processing locks are recovered after STALE_LOCK_THRESHOLD_MINUTES with CAS UPDATE
tests.inputs: Structural analysis of stale lock recovery path

tests.name: User schema includes Stripe customer/subscription/status fields
tests.validated: No phantom states: payment fields are persisted in users table

tests.name: Webhook handlers use only parameterized SQL (no sql.raw)
tests.validated: No SQL injection risk in webhook processing

gates.description: FDR thresholds, boundary classification, hysteresis, reversion penalty, edge cases

tests.name: Canonical FDR thresholds match documented values
tests.validated: CANONICAL_REGIME_THRESHOLDS is the single source of truth with correct values

tests.name: classifyRegimeFromFDR correct at all boundary values
tests.validated: Classification matches canonical thresholds at every boundary
tests.actual: FDR=0→HEALTHY_EXPANSION(OK), FDR=1.19→HEALTHY_EXPANSION(OK), FDR=1.2→ASSET_LED_GROWTH(OK), FDR=1.79→ASSET_LED_GROWTH(OK), FDR=1.8→IMBALANCED_EXCESS(OK), FDR=2.49→IMBALANCED_EXCESS(OK), FDR=2.5→REAL_ECONOMY_LEAD(OK), FDR=5→REAL_ECONOMY_LEAD(OK)

tests.name: Edge case FDR values produce safe defaults
tests.validated: NaN, negative, Infinity all default to HEALTHY_EXPANSION (safe default)

tests.name: Hysteresis: FDR slightly above boundary doesn't trigger transition
tests.validated: Within hysteresis band (0.15), regime stays current

tests.name: Hysteresis: FDR well above boundary triggers transition with confirmation
tests.validated: Beyond hysteresis band, regime transitions with confirmation flag

tests.name: Reversion penalty: 2x hysteresis prevents premature reversion
tests.validated: Reverting to previous regime requires 2x hysteresis band

tests.name: Reversion occurs when past 2x hysteresis band
tests.validated: Reversion triggers when FDR passes 2x hysteresis threshold

tests.name: Regime constants match documented values
tests.validated: Hysteresis, reversion penalty, min duration, confirmation readings

tests.name: validateRegimeClassification detects mismatches
tests.validated: Validation catches stored regime that doesn't match FDR
tests.actual: valid=true, invalid=false, violation=FDR 0.5 should be HEALTHY_EXPANSION, not REAL_ECONOMY_LEAD

invalid1.violation: FDR 0.5 should be HEALTHY_EXPANSION, not REAL_ECONOMY_LEAD

tests.name: Hysteresis safe under NaN/Infinity (stays current)
tests.validated: Invalid FDR values don't crash or change regime

tests.name: Stress test produces report with 6 default scenarios and zero production mutations
tests.validated: Report structure and default scenario count

tests.name: Extreme demand spike scenario multiplies demand by ≥3.5x with stressed values exceeding 2x baseline average
tests.validated: Demand spike simulation correctness
tests.inputs: Baseline avg demand ≈100, extreme spike multiplier
tests.expected: Demand multiplier ≥3.5, stressed avg > 2x baseline avg

tests.name: Supplier outage scenario has supply disruption probability ≥30% and elevated lead times
tests.validated: Supplier outage simulation parameters

tests.name: Price shock scenario has price shock factor ≥1.5x
tests.validated: Price shock simulation parameters

tests.name: Lead-time disruption scenario has lead time multiplier ≥2.5x
tests.validated: Lead-time disruption simulation parameters

tests.name: Compound crisis scenario combines elevated demand, supply disruption, price shock, and lead time
tests.validated: Compound multi-factor stress simulation
tests.expected: All four multipliers elevated above baseline

tests.name: Optimization stability correctly measures service level degradation and stockout risk increase under extreme demand
tests.validated: Optimization stability metrics under stress
tests.expected: Degradation >0, stressed SL < baseline SL, stabilityScore ∈ [0,1]

tests.name: Moderate stress produces less degradation than extreme stress (severity ordering preserved)
tests.validated: Severity ordering consistency
tests.inputs: Moderate vs extreme demand spike scenarios

tests.name: Uncertainty expansion triggers for at least one extreme scenario with multiplier in [1.0, 3.0]
tests.validated: Uncertainty expansion under extreme stress
tests.expected: At least one triggered, all multipliers ∈ [1.0, 3.0]

tests.name: Expanded uncertainty bands are strictly wider than original bands for all triggered scenarios
tests.validated: Uncertainty band widening correctness

tests.name: CVaR delta metrics computed for all scenarios with non-negative tail risk amplification
tests.validated: CVaR delta metric structure and validity

tests.name: Extreme scenarios produce higher average demand CVaR99 than moderate scenarios
tests.validated: CVaR severity ordering

tests.name: At least one extreme scenario triggers automation downgrade
tests.validated: Automation downgrade under extreme stress

tests.name: At least one extreme scenario triggers emergency_halt or manual_only downgrade
tests.validated: Downgrade severity escalation for extreme stress
tests.expected: At least one emergency_halt or manual_only

tests.name: Safe mode recommended for at least one scenario including at least one extreme
tests.validated: Safe mode recommendation under stress

tests.name: Escalation required for at least one high-risk stress scenario
tests.validated: Escalation requirement under extreme stress

tests.name: All downgraded scenarios have non-empty trigger reasons explaining the downgrade
tests.validated: Downgrade explainability

tests.name: All stress scenarios produce volatility estimates for all 4 regimes
tests.validated: Volatility estimation under stress

tests.name: All stress scenarios produce model weight computations
tests.validated: Model weight recomputation under stress
tests.expected: Non-empty model weights array per scenario

tests.name: Aggregate summary has correct tallies, robustness score ∈ [0,1], and valid overall rating
tests.validated: Aggregate summary correctness

tests.name: Aggregate downgrade/safeMode/halt counts match individual scenario results
tests.validated: Aggregate summary consistency with scenario results
tests.expected: Summary counts match individual scenario tallies

tests.name: Evidence bundle has provenance v6.0.0 with stress testing traceability metadata
tests.validated: Evidence bundle provenance and traceability

tests.name: Config hash is deterministic: identical inputs produce identical SHA-256 hash
tests.validated: Deterministic config hashing

tests.name: Deterministic replay produces identical stress test results (hash, CVaR, stability, robustness score)
tests.validated: Deterministic replay integrity
tests.expected: All key metrics identical across runs

tests.name: Robustness report markdown includes all required sections and production safety
tests.validated: Report artifact generation
tests.expected: MD with all sections: Baseline, Scenarios, Stability, CVaR, Downgrade, Expansion, Aggregate, Safety

tests.name: Report and evidence bundle both confirm zero production mutations
tests.validated: Production safety guarantee

tests.name: POST /api/stress-test/run returns 401 without auth
tests.validated: Auth enforcement on stress test API

tests.name: GET /api/stress-test/reports returns 401 without auth
tests.validated: Auth enforcement on stress test reports list

tests.name: Custom scenario specs produce targeted stress test with only specified scenarios
tests.validated: Custom scenario specification
tests.inputs: 2 custom scenarios: severe demand_spike, extreme supplier_outage

tests.name: Baseline metrics include tail risk, 4-regime volatility, and uncertainty expansion state
tests.validated: Baseline metrics completeness
tests.expected: Tail risk CVaR values, 4 volatility estimates, uncertainty expansion state

gates.description: Revenue integrity validation with pilot revenue dashboard, executive report generation, metric reconciliation, savings separation, tenant isolation, and landing mode configuration

tests.name: Pilot run produces zero production mutations
tests.validated: Zero production mutation guarantee for pilot experiments

tests.name: Revenue dashboard surfaces all 5 key ROI metrics
tests.validated: Revenue dashboard metric completeness
tests.expected: 5 metrics: serviceLevelImprovement, stockoutReduction, expediteSpendReduction, workingCapitalImpact, realizedSavings

tests.name: Dashboard metrics reconcile with experiment artifact values
tests.validated: Metric reconciliation between dashboard and experiment data
tests.expected: Dashboard SL, stockout, expedite match experiment optimizedResults

tests.name: Estimated savings are explicitly labeled as 'estimated'
tests.validated: Savings type labeling for transparency

tests.name: Measured savings cannot populate without realized invoice data
tests.validated: No phantom savings completion - measured requires invoice verification

tests.name: No phantom completions - hasMeasuredData=false without invoices
tests.validated: Anti-phantom completion check

tests.name: Revenue dashboard is tenant-scoped - Company B cannot see Company A experiments
tests.validated: Tenant isolation on revenue dashboard
tests.expected: No experiments from Company A visible

tests.name: All pilot metrics link to evidence bundles
tests.validated: Evidence bundle attachment for audit trail

tests.name: Executive report generated with valid structure
tests.validated: Executive report generation with config hash and replay ID
tests.expected: reportId>0, configHash matches, replayId starts with exec-, productionMutations=0

tests.name: Executive report contains complete ROI summary with all 5 metrics
tests.validated: ROI summary completeness in executive report

tests.name: Executive report contains baseline vs optimized comparison window
tests.validated: Comparison window structure in executive report

tests.name: Executive report contains immutable experiment hash (SHA-256)
tests.validated: Immutable experiment hash in executive report

tests.name: Executive report has deterministic replay ID
tests.validated: Replay ID for reproducibility
tests.expected: replayId starts with exec- and contains experimentId

tests.name: Executive report markdown contains all required sections
tests.validated: Markdown artifact completeness
tests.expected: Markdown with Executive header, ROI, Comparison Window, Realized Savings, Production Safety

tests.name: Executive report JSON artifact has correct structure
tests.validated: JSON artifact structure for PDF-ready rendering

tests.name: Executive report ROI reconciles with dashboard metrics
tests.validated: Cross-artifact metric reconciliation
tests.expected: SL delta and expedite delta match between report and dashboard

tests.name: No missing data silently inflates ROI - measured savings null when unverified
tests.validated: Anti-inflation check: estimated vs measured separation

tests.name: All savings claims link to evidence bundles with provenance
tests.validated: Evidence bundle linkage for savings auditability

tests.name: Revenue dashboard endpoint requires authentication
tests.validated: Auth enforcement on GET /api/pilot/revenue-dashboard

tests.name: Executive report generation endpoint requires authentication
tests.validated: Auth enforcement on POST /api/pilot/generate-executive-report

tests.name: Executive reports cannot be generated for another tenant's experiment
tests.validated: Cross-tenant executive report generation blocked

tests.name: Rate limiting is present on executive report endpoint (auth required first)
tests.validated: Rate limiting protection via auth + per-tenant counter
tests.expected: Request rejected (401 auth required before rate limit applies)

tests.name: Landing mode configuration can be enabled per tenant
tests.validated: Landing mode flag persisted in database

tests.name: Landing mode endpoint requires authentication
tests.validated: Auth enforcement on GET /api/landing-mode

tests.name: Single-experiment revenue dashboard lookup returns correct data
tests.validated: Per-experiment dashboard lookup

tests.name: Cross-tenant single-experiment lookup returns null
tests.validated: Tenant isolation on per-experiment dashboard

tests.name: Executive reports list is tenant-scoped
tests.validated: Tenant isolation on executive reports listing
tests.expected: Company A has reports, Company B has none

tests.name: All executive reports have zero production mutations
tests.validated: Zero production mutation guarantee on executive reports

tests.name: Service level delta correctly computed from baseline and optimized values
tests.validated: Delta computation accuracy

tests.name: Expedite spend reduction correctly computed from baseline and optimized values
tests.validated: Expedite spend delta computation accuracy
